hero.headline: Precision PET Preform Mold Engineering
hero.subheadline: From preform to bottle — high-performance PET preform molds, blow molds, and hot runner systems engineered for the world's leading beverage, food, and packaging manufacturers.

showcaseCategories.name: PET Preform Mold
showcaseCategories.description: Multi-cavity preform molds up to 160 cavities. Compatible with HUSKY, NETSTAL, and SIPA injection molding platforms.
showcaseCategories.alt: preform-mold - High-cavitation PET preform mold system

showcaseCategories.name: Compression Mold
showcaseCategories.description: Precision closure compression molds for high-speed SACMI production lines, delivering food-grade PET packaging solutions.

showcaseCategories.name: PET Blow Mold
showcaseCategories.description: Two-step and one-step PET blow molds for SIDEL, KRONES, KHS, and more — serving beverage packaging and mineral water bottle production.

moldHighlights.title: LIHE PET Preform Injection Molds
moldHighlights.description: LIHE PET preform injection molds deliver exceptional performance for the beverage and packaging industries. Our tooling solutions ensure high efficiency, reliability, and seamless integration for global customers.

items.title: Wide Range of Cavities
items.content: We provide advanced mold designs from 2 to 160 cavities to meet your specific production needs.

items.title: Reliable Hot Runner Systems
items.content: Our Hot Runner systems (2 to 160 cavities) feature a specialized design with a 3-year leakage-proof guarantee.

items.title: Standard Neck Finish Support
items.content: We support all major industry standards, including PCO 1881, PCO 1810, PCO 1716, 3025, 2925, 2622, 2522, Alaska, 38mm, 48mm, 69mm, 89mm, and other customized neck finish.

items.title: High Precision & Consistency
items.content: We offer flexible configurations with the industry’s lowest dimensional variability, ensuring stable preform quality.

items.title: Compatibility with Global Brands
items.content: LIHE provides superior solutions and parts for customers currently using Husky, SACMI, SIPA, or NETSTAL systems.

items.title: Universal Conversion Capability
items.content: We engineer high-precision conversion parts for all major international mold brands, ensuring seamless integration with your existing equipment.
